div.div: This node will have to choose between its two possible neighbours. It doesn't matter which one is chosen, so we don't lock the parent writing assignment and use the parent which was last written.

div.div: Nodes with the sex "+" cannot initiate connections, but they can receive as many as they can.

div.div: Nodes with the sex "-" can choose ONE mate with sex "+" from their neighbors.
